assertions.title: Diagram data sourced from API

steps.action: Quick-fix attempt: query map surface for domain data
steps.expected: If contract paths are aliases, map variants should resolve to same payload
steps.observed: GET /api/map/solution/domain%2Fentities -> 400 unknown slot; GET /api/map/solution/domain%2Frelationships -> 400 unknown slot; only GET /api/map/solution/domain -> 200 with nested entities/relationships

assertions.issues: Contract-specified ER endpoints are not implemented on this API surface; required entity/relationship paths returned 404.

assertions.title: Knowledge Space accumulates across all acts

steps.expected: Pipeline precondition indicates full run completed
steps.observed: POST /api/init -> 200 already_initialized; GET /api/pipeline/status -> step1..step7 pending and step8 in_progress

steps.expected: Glossary contains terms from all 3 acts
steps.observed: HTTP 200; glossary includes terms tagged from step1, step2, step3, step4 and untagged build-related terms

steps.expected: Changelog contains entries for Act 1 (vibe), Act 2 (domain), and Act 3 (build)
steps.observed: HTTP 200; all entries are task/build style records (task_id, related_specs, files_touched); no Act1/Act2 entries present

steps.expected: Cross-references link terms to specs and artifacts
steps.observed: HTTP 200; xrefs include term + spec_path + artifact_path mappings

assertions.issues: Knowledge data is present, but changelog evidence does not span all acts (only build/task entries), and pipeline status does not indicate a completed full pipeline.

frictions.description: Validation contract path examples for ER data (/api/solution/domain/entities, /api/solution/domain/relationships) do not match implemented route surface; API serves ER data through /api/map/solution/domain.
frictions.resolution: Captured both contract-path failures and implemented-path success as evidence.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-ERD-012 failed due missing contract ER endpoints; VAL-CROSS-084 failed because changelog evidence did not cover all acts and pipeline status was not fully complete.
